summaryAm: በቀስታ እና በትዕግሥት መጓዝ ወደ መድረሻ እንደሚያደርስ የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation.

pages.textAm: የኤሊው እና የጥንቸሉ ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Tortoise and the Hare story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A calm tortoise and lively hare meet near a sunny path.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ ትዕግሥትን እና ጽናትን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the patience and persistence moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tortoise keeps walking slowly while the hare rests nearby.

pages.textEn: The story will end with joy and learning.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The tortoise reaches the finish while the hare learns kindly.
